about.title: About
about.subtitle: Get to know a little more about me
about.who_text: I'm Melchisedek Lima, a Full Stack developer focused on backend and a Computer Science student. I'm passionate about solving complex problems with clean, well-structured code. My experience combines software development with technology teaching, which gave me a unique perspective on technical communication and system architecture.
about.what_text: I specialize in backend development with Java and Spring Boot, building robust REST APIs, data modeling with PostgreSQL and MySQL, and system integration. I also work on the frontend with Angular and React, delivering complete end-to-end solutions.
about.vision_text: I believe that good software comes from good practices. I'm guided by clean architecture, SOLID principles, testing, and continuous improvement. My goal is to evolve as a software engineer contributing to projects that positively impact people and businesses.
about.education_text: Bachelor's in Computer Science — UNINASSAU (2025–2028). I complement my academic education with certifications, personal projects, and constant self-directed learning.

bullets: Full stack feature development with Java, Spring Boot, and Angular
Maintenance and evolution of REST APIs and PostgreSQL integration
Participation in code reviews and adoption of development best practices
Technical support for internal teams and incident resolution
Process documentation and IT infrastructure maintenance
Backend feature development in Java with Spring Boot
Business logic implementation and database integration
Agile team collaboration with weekly deliveries
Teaching programming fundamentals and computational logic
Creating educational materials and practical assessments
Teaching technical subjects in computer science and basic programming
Individual student support and practical project guidance and research
Equipment maintenance and general technical support
Organization and automation of administrative processes and event management

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I master and that I'm learning

items.title: Taskflow Reports
items.description: Internal system for task management and traceability of technical demands, with operational report control and process automation.
items.overview: Taskflow Reports is a complete demand management system developed to optimize the operational workflow of technical teams.
items.problem: Technical teams often deal with fragmented demand traceability, manual reports, and lack of visibility over the progress of critical tasks.
items.decisions: The architecture was built with Spring Boot on the backend, ensuring robustness and scalability. The React frontend offers a responsive and intuitive interface. PostgreSQL was chosen for its reliability in complex relational modeling.
items.challenges: The main challenge was modeling the permissions system and access levels without compromising query performance. The solution involved strategic use of JPA with optimized queries.
items.results: 40% reduction in report generation time and significant improvement in team demand traceability.

items.title: FacePresence
items.description: Web application integrated with backend services for attendance control with real-time facial recognition.
items.overview: FacePresence is an innovative attendance control solution that uses facial recognition to automate entry and exit registration.
items.problem: Traditional attendance control systems are susceptible to fraud and require significant manual time for management.
items.decisions: Angular was chosen for the frontend due to its robustness in enterprise applications. WebSocket enables real-time communication between camera and server. The Spring Boot backend processes facial data with ML service integration.
items.challenges: Integrating real-time facial recognition flow with minimal latency was the biggest technical challenge. The solution involved data pipeline optimization via WebSocket.
items.results: Functional system with recognition rate above 95% and average verification time under 2 seconds.

items.title: AcadSheet Automation
items.description: Automated spreadsheet system for academic control, reducing 30% of time on manual administrative tasks.
items.overview: AcadSheet Automation is a spreadsheet automation solution developed for educational institutions that need to optimize their academic processes.
items.problem: Educational institutions spend hours per week on manual tasks of filling in, calculating grades, and generating academic reports.
items.decisions: The choice of VBA and Office 365 was strategic, as it allows direct integration with tools already used by institutions, without the need for additional infrastructure.
items.challenges: Ensuring compatibility between different Excel versions and handling varying data volumes without compromising macro performance.
items.results: 30% reduction in time spent on administrative tasks and elimination of manual errors in grade and attendance calculations.
